span.p:
AmplitudeLoader — Schmidt-like CRY cascade
(loader/amplitude_loader.py)

factor_loadings
p_zeros · ρ

span.p: to_gate()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(107, 31, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
θ⁽ⁱ⁾ : float32[2K+4]
one draw from p(θ | data_obs)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 31, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
θ layout (loader/posterior_factor_copula.py)
θ[0:K] = factor loadings bᵢ
θ[K:2K] = unconditional PDs pᵢ
θ[2K] = tail_dep (informational)
θ[2K+1] = global correlation ρ
θ[2K+2] = dof ν (informational)
θ[2K+3] = spare (unused)

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GaussianFactorCopula
copula/gaussian.py
Z ~ N(0,1)
Xᵢ = bᵢ·Z + √(1−bᵢ²)·εᵢ
Uᵢ = Φ(Xᵢ)

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
U_marginals
float32[10000, K]

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Default-pattern extraction
defaults[i,k] = (U[i,k] < p_zeros[k])
→ int8[10000, K]

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Histogram over 2^K scenarios
probs[j] = #rows matching pattern j / 10000
→ float32[2^K]
Σⱼ probs[j] = 1

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LGD array
fixed at 0.40 per loan (K entries)
→ float32[K]

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Loss per scenario
losses[j] = Σₖ bitₖ(j) · LGD[k]
→ float32[2^K]

div.style: color: rgb(91, 71, 8) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Amplitude normalisation
amp[j] = √max(probs[j], 1e-10)
amp /= ‖amp‖₂
α[j] = arcsin(amp[j] / max(amp))
→ angles float32[2^K]

div.style: color: rgb(31, 42, 68) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Register layout
q[0..K-1] : state register (K qubits)
q[K] : target qubit (1 qubit)
total qubits = K+1, ancillas = 0

div.style: color: rgb(31, 42, 68) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Initial state
|0⟩^⊗K ⊗ |0⟩
(all qubits reset to zero)

div.style: color: rgb(31, 42, 68) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(31, 42, 68) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Output state on state register
|ψ(θ⁽ⁱ⁾)⟩ = Σⱼ √pⱼ(θ) · |j⟩state ⊗ |0⟩target
The loss distribution P(L = lⱼ) is now stored
as amplitudes of the K-qubit state register.
The target qubit is left in |0⟩ ready for QSVT.

div.style: color: rgb(27, 61, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
.to_gate()
returns a reusable Gate
.num_qubits = K + 1
.num_ancillas = 0
Compatible with get_expected_probability_circuit

div.style: color: rgb(27, 61, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QSVTRiskCircuit.append
appends loader gate onto qubits[0..K]
(state register + target qubit)

div.style: color: rgb(27, 61, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QSVT polynomial
(Code/QSVT.py + qsvt/approximator.py)
Adds aux qubit q[K+1].
Applies phase rotations φ₁, …, φ_d on target
alternating with U and U⁻¹ of the objective.
Final measurement ≈ P(loss ≤ target_loss).
